lean_translation:
def abs_val (x : Int) : Int :=
  if x < 0 then -x else x

theorems.name: abs_val_nonneg
theorems.statement: theorem abs_val_nonneg (x : Int) : 0 ≤ abs_val x

theorems.name: abs_val_self_pos
theorems.statement: theorem abs_val_self_pos (x : Int) : x ≥ 0 → abs_val x = x
theorems.proof: by simp [abs_val]; intro h; split_ifs <;> omega

theorems.name: abs_val_neg
theorems.statement: theorem abs_val_neg (x : Int) : x < 0 → abs_val x = -x
theorems.proof: by simp [abs_val]; intro h; split_ifs <;> omega

lean_translation:
def max_of_two (a b : Int) : Int :=
  if a ≥ b then a else b

theorems.name: max_of_two_ge_left
theorems.statement: theorem max_of_two_ge_left (a b : Int) : max_of_two a b ≥ a

theorems.name: max_of_two_ge_right
theorems.statement: theorem max_of_two_ge_right (a b : Int) : max_of_two a b ≥ b

theorems.name: max_of_two_comm
theorems.statement: theorem max_of_two_comm (a b : Int) : max_of_two a b = max_of_two b a

lean_translation:
def min_of_two (a b : Int) : Int :=
  if a ≤ b then a else b

theorems.name: min_of_two_le_left
theorems.statement: theorem min_of_two_le_left (a b : Int) : min_of_two a b ≤ a

theorems.name: min_of_two_le_right
theorems.statement: theorem min_of_two_le_right (a b : Int) : min_of_two a b ≤ b

theorems.name: min_of_two_comm
theorems.statement: theorem min_of_two_comm (a b : Int) : min_of_two a b = min_of_two b a

lean_translation:
def clamp (x lo hi : Int) : Int :=
  if x < lo then lo
  else if x > hi then hi
  else x

theorems.name: clamp_bounds
theorems.statement: theorem clamp_bounds (x lo hi : Int) : lo ≤ hi → lo ≤ clamp x lo hi ∧ clamp x lo hi ≤ hi
theorems.proof: by intro h; unfold clamp; split · constructor <;> omega · split · constructor <;> omega · constructor <;> omega

theorems.name: clamp_idempotent
theorems.statement: theorem clamp_idempotent (x lo hi : Int) : lo ≤ hi → clamp (clamp x lo hi) lo hi = clamp x lo hi
theorems.proof: by intro h; simp only [clamp]; split <;> split <;> simp_all <;> omega

theorems.name: clamp_fixed_point
theorems.statement: theorem clamp_fixed_point (x lo hi : Int) : lo ≤ x → x ≤ hi → clamp x lo hi = x
theorems.proof: by unfold clamp; split <;> split <;> omega

lean_translation:
def factorial : Nat → Nat
  | 0 => 1
  | n + 1 => (n + 1) * factorial n

theorems.name: factorial_zero
theorems.statement: theorem factorial_zero : factorial 0 = 1

theorems.name: factorial_succ
theorems.statement: theorem factorial_succ (n : Nat) : factorial (n + 1) = (n + 1) * factorial n

theorems.name: factorial_pos
theorems.statement: theorem factorial_pos (n : Nat) : factorial n > 0

lean_translation:
def fibonacci : Nat → Nat
  | 0 => 0
  | 1 => 1
  | n + 2 => fibonacci (n + 1) + fibonacci n

theorems.name: fibonacci_recurrence
theorems.statement: theorem fibonacci_recurrence (n : Nat) : fibonacci (n + 2) = fibonacci (n + 1) + fibonacci n

theorems.name: fibonacci_zero
theorems.statement: theorem fibonacci_zero : fibonacci 0 = 0

theorems.name: fibonacci_one
theorems.statement: theorem fibonacci_one : fibonacci 1 = 1

lean_translation:
def sign (x : Int) : Int :=
  if x > 0 then 1
  else if x < 0 then -1
  else 0

theorems.name: sign_pos
theorems.statement: theorem sign_pos (x : Int) : x > 0 → sign x = 1
theorems.proof: by simp [sign]; intro h; split_ifs <;> omega

theorems.name: sign_neg
theorems.statement: theorem sign_neg (x : Int) : x < 0 → sign x = -1
theorems.proof: by simp [sign]; intro h; split_ifs <;> omega

theorems.name: sign_trichotomy
theorems.statement: theorem sign_trichotomy (x : Int) : sign x = 1 ∨ sign x = -1 ∨ sign x = 0
theorems.proof: by unfold sign; split · left; rfl · split · right; left; rfl · right; right; rfl

lean_translation:
def abs_val (x : Int) : Int :=
  if x < 0 then -x else x
tests:
def abs_val(x):
    if x < 0: return -x
    return x
assert abs_val(5)==5
assert abs_val(-5)==5
assert abs_val(0)==0

theorems.name: abs_val_nonneg
theorems.statement: theorem abs_val_nonneg (x : Int) : 0 ≤ abs_val x

theorems.name: abs_val_self_pos
theorems.statement: theorem abs_val_self_pos (x : Int) : x ≥ 0 → abs_val x = x
theorems.proof: by simp [abs_val]; intro h; split_ifs <;> omega

theorems.name: abs_val_neg
theorems.statement: theorem abs_val_neg (x : Int) : x < 0 → abs_val x = -x
theorems.proof: by simp [abs_val]; intro h; split_ifs <;> omega

lean_translation:
def max_of_two (a b : Int) : Int :=
  if a ≥ b then a else b
tests:
def max_of_two(a,b):
    if a>=b: return a
    return b
assert max_of_two(5,3)==5
assert max_of_two(3,5)==5

theorems.name: max_of_two_ge_left
theorems.statement: theorem max_of_two_ge_left (a b : Int) : max_of_two a b ≥ a

theorems.name: max_of_two_ge_right
theorems.statement: theorem max_of_two_ge_right (a b : Int) : max_of_two a b ≥ b

theorems.name: max_of_two_comm
theorems.statement: theorem max_of_two_comm (a b : Int) : max_of_two a b = max_of_two b a

lean_translation:
def min_of_two (a b : Int) : Int :=
  if a ≤ b then a else b
tests:
def min_of_two(a,b):
    if a<=b: return a
    return b
assert min_of_two(5,3)==3
assert min_of_two(3,5)==3

theorems.name: min_of_two_le_left
theorems.statement: theorem min_of_two_le_left (a b : Int) : min_of_two a b ≤ a

theorems.name: min_of_two_le_right
theorems.statement: theorem min_of_two_le_right (a b : Int) : min_of_two a b ≤ b

theorems.name: min_of_two_comm
theorems.statement: theorem min_of_two_comm (a b : Int) : min_of_two a b = min_of_two b a

lean_translation:
def clamp (x lo hi : Int) : Int :=
  if x < lo then lo
  else if x > hi then hi
  else x
tests:
def clamp(x,lo,hi):
    if x<lo: return lo
    if x>hi: return hi
    return x
assert clamp(5,0,10)==5
assert clamp(-5,0,10)==0
assert clamp(15,0,10)==10

theorems.name: clamp_bounds
theorems.statement: theorem clamp_bounds (x lo hi : Int) : lo ≤ hi → lo ≤ clamp x lo hi ∧ clamp x lo hi ≤ hi
theorems.proof: by intro h; unfold clamp; split · constructor <;> omega · split · constructor <;> omega · constructor <;> omega

theorems.name: clamp_idempotent
theorems.statement: theorem clamp_idempotent (x lo hi : Int) : lo ≤ hi → clamp (clamp x lo hi) lo hi = clamp x lo hi
theorems.proof: by intro h; simp only [clamp]; split <;> split <;> simp_all <;> omega

theorems.name: clamp_fixed_point
theorems.statement: theorem clamp_fixed_point (x lo hi : Int) : lo ≤ x → x ≤ hi → clamp x lo hi = x
theorems.proof: by unfold clamp; split <;> split <;> omega

lean_translation:
def factorial : Nat → Nat
  | 0 => 1
  | n + 1 => (n + 1) * factorial n
tests:
def factorial(n):
    r=1
    for i in range(2,n+1): r*=i
    return r
assert factorial(0)==1
assert factorial(5)==120

theorems.name: factorial_zero
theorems.statement: theorem factorial_zero : factorial 0 = 1

theorems.name: factorial_succ
theorems.statement: theorem factorial_succ (n : Nat) : factorial (n + 1) = (n + 1) * factorial n

theorems.name: factorial_pos
theorems.statement: theorem factorial_pos (n : Nat) : factorial n > 0

lean_translation:
def fibonacci : Nat → Nat
  | 0 => 0
  | 1 => 1
  | n + 2 => fibonacci (n + 1) + fibonacci n
tests:
def fibonacci(n):
    if n<=1: return n
    a,b=0,1
    for _ in range(2,n+1): a,b=b,a+b
    return b
assert fibonacci(0)==0
assert fibonacci(1)==1
assert fibonacci(10)==55

theorems.name: fibonacci_recurrence
theorems.statement: theorem fibonacci_recurrence (n : Nat) : fibonacci (n + 2) = fibonacci (n + 1) + fibonacci n

theorems.name: fibonacci_zero
theorems.statement: theorem fibonacci_zero : fibonacci 0 = 0

theorems.name: fibonacci_one
theorems.statement: theorem fibonacci_one : fibonacci 1 = 1

lean_translation:
def sign (x : Int) : Int :=
  if x > 0 then 1
  else if x < 0 then -1
  else 0
tests:
def sign(x):
    if x>0: return 1
    if x<0: return -1
    return 0
assert sign(10)==1
assert sign(-10)==-1
assert sign(0)==0

theorems.name: sign_pos
theorems.statement: theorem sign_pos (x : Int) : x > 0 → sign x = 1
theorems.proof: by simp [sign]; intro h; split_ifs <;> omega

theorems.name: sign_neg
theorems.statement: theorem sign_neg (x : Int) : x < 0 → sign x = -1
theorems.proof: by simp [sign]; intro h; split_ifs <;> omega

theorems.name: sign_trichotomy
theorems.statement: theorem sign_trichotomy (x : Int) : sign x = 1 ∨ sign x = -1 ∨ sign x = 0
theorems.proof: by unfold sign; split · left; rfl · split · right; left; rfl · right; right; rfl
